name: Cohort of Chaos
description: Increase your Strength, Dexterity, Constitution, Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 20. When you roll a 1 or a 20 on an attack roll or a saving throw, you trigger a Chaotic Flare that lasts until the end of your next turn. Roll a d4 to determine the effect: 1 (Battle Fury: A creature of your choice has advantage on attack rolls and disadvantage on ability checks), 2 (Disruption Field: Creatures starting their turn or entering within 5 feet of you take 1d8 force damage), 3 (Unbound: You can teleport using your walking speed), or 4 (Wailing Winds: You and creatures within 15 feet have disadvantage on Wisdom saving throws). A new flare cannot occur until the current one ends.
